preview_text:
How: Spinning rotation -> inner ear (vestibular system) -> reflex drive extra ocular muscle movement (vestibulo-ocular reflex) 
Why: It is the opposite direction of head movement to stabilize the projected image on the retina by compensating for the head movement. (Built-in stablizer)How: Spinning rotation -> inner ear (vestibular system) -> reflex drive extra ocular muscle movement (vestibulo-ocular reflex)
